allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/ai/build -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""query"": ""Build PC gaming 25 trieu""}")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(''''/dev/stdin'''',''''utf8''''\)\); const b=d.data?.build; console.log\(''''BuildType:'''', d.data?.analysis?.buildType\); console.log\(''''Budget:'''', d.data?.analysis?.budget?.toLocaleString\(''''vi-VN''''\)+''''đ''''\); console.log\(''''Total:'''', b?.estimated_total_cost?.toLocaleString\(''''vi-VN''''\)+''''đ''''\); console.log\(''''Score:'''', b?.compatibility?.compatibility_score+''''/100''''\); console.log\(''''Explanation:'''', d.data?.explanation\);")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/ai/build -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""query"": ""PC van phong 10 trieu""}")
